name: Character Consistency
pass_condition_summary: Character behavior stays compatible with established motives and voice.
output_focus: Flag unexplained changes in motive, tone, or behavior.

name: Knowledge State Conflict
pass_condition_summary: No character acts on information they have not learned yet.
output_focus: Flag impossible awareness or unsupported deductions.

name: Timeline Conflict
pass_condition_summary: Events can be ordered without contradiction.
output_focus: Flag incompatible timing, travel, or sequence assumptions.

name: World Rule Violation
pass_condition_summary: Scenes remain compatible with established world rules or explicit exceptions.
output_focus: Flag rule changes that are not explained or authorized.

name: Setup Payoff Gap
pass_condition_summary: Important setups are paid off within a meaningful window or intentionally left open.
output_focus: Flag hanging promises, weak payoffs, and orphaned setups.

name: Scene Goal Missing
pass_condition_summary: Each scene has a clear objective and opposition.
output_focus: Flag scenes that drift without a playable objective.

name: Scene Turn Missing
pass_condition_summary: Each scene changes the situation, value, or relationship state.
output_focus: Flag static scenes that end where they started.

name: Middle Sag
pass_condition_summary: Middle sequences introduce escalation, revelation, or strategic change.
output_focus: Flag repeated scene patterns with low escalation.

name: Exposition Overload
pass_condition_summary: Dialogue conveys information with intent, conflict, and subtext.
output_focus: Flag scenes that explain too much without dramatic pressure.

name: Production Hotspot
pass_condition_summary: High-cost elements are visible and not overly concentrated without payoff.
output_focus: Flag clusters of expensive scenes with low story return.

name: Arc Tracking
pass_condition_summary: Scene emotion and value shift remain compatible with the intended arc stage.
output_focus: Flag scenes whose emotional turn contradicts the expected arc path.

name: Motif Tracking
pass_condition_summary: Core visual motif appears with meaningful frequency and stays semantically coherent.
output_focus: Flag missing, excessive, or distorted motif usage.
